title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
